name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: We’re now in the fourth quarter of this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
I just met a supporter who told me that he’s all in for us and what we’re
trying to do for Texas and the country. He said that given his age, he’s
thinking about what kind of legacy and impact he’s going to leave for his
kids and grandkids given the extreme attacks on our rights and freedoms in
Texas under Greg Abbott.

“I just celebrated my 75th birthday,” he told me. “And the way I look at
it, I’m now in the fourth quarter.”

What that means for him is that, “We are all in, no matter what. Everyone
plays injured. We fight like hell with all we’ve got until the last second
ticks off that clock. And we win this thing.”

I like his spirit!

It’s how I think about this campaign and the time that we have left. With
only a little more than three months to go until early voting starts in
this election, we’re now in the fourth quarter. Every one of us has to
play our hearts out, no matter what. And we’ve got to win.

For me that means I’ll be in Dallas, Amarillo, and Uvalde this weekend,
and San Antonio on Monday. And we’ll keep this pace going, and even pick
it up, until the end. I am nonstop, talking to every eligible voter I can,
until the last ballot is cast on the night of November 8th.

For our more than 78,000 volunteers, that means knocking on the doors of
the voters who are going to decide the outcome of this election. Those in
person, face-to-face, conversations are one of the most powerful ways to
persuade a non-voter to register, or an infrequent voter to show up or a
swing voter to join our cause at this critical moment.

And for you — and the hundreds of thousands of donors who’ve stepped up
over the last seven months — [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220710-1.FYv7Xy&refcode=ema20220710-197769&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=197769%2E444211%2EwHwT4H ]it means giving what you can now so that
we can fund the organizers, get the ads up on TV and social media, send
mail to the voters we’ve targeted in this election and reach the people
who might not otherwise know what’s at stake.

Abbott is reeling, and now is the time to press our advantage. You’ve seen
the polls over the last few weeks — each one showing us closer and closer
to overtaking Abbott as he becomes more unpopular and as more Texans say
our state is going in the wrong direction with him. On this trajectory and
pace, it’s only a matter of time before we’re ahead. How much time depends
on how hard we work and how much we can raise.

You’ve seen Texans showing up in record numbers at our events all over the
state. You’ve even heard your Republican friend say “I voted for Abbott
before, but after [insert their pick of the latest Abbott disasters: the
grid failure, gun violence, attacks on women’s rights, defunding our
public schools, etc.], I just can’t do so again.”

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220710-1.FYv7Xy&refcode=ema20220710-197769&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=197769%2E444211%2EwHwT4H ]You know now more than ever that we can win this. Please make sure we
have the resources to get it done.

clean_body: I just met a supporter who told me that he’s all in for us and what we’re trying to do for Texas and the country. He said that given his age, he’s thinking about what kind of legacy and impact he’s going to leave for his kids and grandkids given the extreme attacks on our rights and freedoms in Texas under Greg Abbott. “I just celebrated my 75th birthday,” he told me. “And the way I look at it, I’m now in the fourth quarter.” What that means for him is that, “We are all in, no matter what. Everyone plays injured. We fight like hell with all we’ve got until the last second ticks off that clock. And we win this thing.” I like his spirit! It’s how I think about this campaign and the time that we have left. With only a little more than three months to go until early voting starts in this election, we’re now in the fourth quarter. Every one of us has to play our hearts out, no matter what. And we’ve got to win. For me that means I’ll be in Dallas, Amarillo, and Uvalde this weekend, and San Antonio on Monday. And we’ll keep this pace going, and even pick it up, until the end. I am nonstop, talking to every eligible voter I can, until the last ballot is cast on the night of November 8th. For our more than 78,000 volunteers, that means knocking on the doors of the voters who are going to decide the outcome of this election. Those in person, face-to-face, conversations are one of the most powerful ways to persuade a non-voter to register, or an infrequent voter to show up or a swing voter to join our cause at this critical moment. And for you — and the hundreds of thousands of donors who’ve stepped up over the last seven months — [ ]it means giving what you can now so that we can fund the organizers, get the ads up on TV and social media, send mail to the voters we’ve targeted in this election and reach the people who might not otherwise know what’s at stake. Abbott is reeling, and now is the time to press our advantage. You’ve seen the polls over the last few weeks — each one showing us closer and closer to overtaking Abbott as he becomes more unpopular and as more Texans say our state is going in the wrong direction with him. On this trajectory and pace, it’s only a matter of time before we’re ahead. How much time depends on how hard we work and how much we can raise. You’ve seen Texans showing up in record numbers at our events all over the state. You’ve even heard your Republican friend say “I voted for Abbott before, but after [insert their pick of the latest Abbott disasters: the grid failure, gun violence, attacks on women’s rights, defunding our public schools, etc.], I just can’t do so again.” [ ]You know now more than ever that we can win this. Please make sure we have the resources to get it done. [ ]Contribute $3 Beto

name: Josh Harder
subject: please read (it’s important)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
Hey team,
I'm reaching out today because there have been a couple more major developments in our race, and I hope by the end of this email you'll chip in to help us out. Here is the [link](https://act.myngp.com/el/z2w_PVmZtLg7R4nd5tbfZaQnIYbzI_8Gghjj_9oNbdk=/gSwFEHwHL4PbPeBrFH-ZXmav2XZu2WT_wz7i0dcokXk=?refcode=E16846-20220709-JoshPersonal-SL-CampaignNews-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=25).
First, Republicans got their top candidate to run against me, County Supervisor Tom Patti. He was hand picked by Kevin McCarthy to be my opponent because he is in lock step with the MAGA wing of the Republican party.
Then, political forecasters downgraded our race to a toss-up. They said our contest will likely decide who controls Congress this November. Nate Silver even said we have a real chance of losing.
Now, the GOP is waging an all-out assault on a woman's right to choose and our basic freedoms in this country - and Tom Patti could be the deciding vote to criminalize abortion nationally.
After all of these developments, we're in trouble. And the GOP knows it. That's why Kevin McCarthy laid down a brand new attack campaign against me over the 4th of July.
I'm afraid July will be a slower fundraising month for us and that we won't have the resources we need to fight back effectively. I don't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so that's why I'm coming to you today and asking for your support.
Can you please send in an urgent donation right now to help us keep this seat blue?
Here is a link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-July2022-FR-July?refcode2=Peter](https://act.myngp.com/el/z2w_PVmZtLg7R4nd5tbfZaQnIYbzI_8Gghjj_9oNbdk=/gSwFEHwHL4PbPeBrFH-ZXmav2XZu2WT_wz7i0dcokXk=?refcode=E16846-20220709-JoshPersonal-SL-CampaignNews-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=25)
I hope I can count on you.
\- Josh

Monica describes herself as a former Democrat who “walked away” from the party to cast her vote for Donald Trump because she believed he was “bringing to light the terrible things that we were doing to our country.”
The reality is she didn’t just walk away from the party — but from the people of TX-15.
Michelle, on the other hand, has been working with and alongside the people her entire life. She knows the people of this district and knows that they are ready for bold change, new vision, and real leadership.
Michelle is “running in the most competitive House race in Texas,” a race gaining more and more attention due to just how critical this seat is for this district, Texas, and the entire country.
It could mean the difference between whether we keep Democratic control or see yet another MAGA-minded politician in the House.
[**We can’t afford to let that happen. clean_body: | | | Peter, you need to see this headline: In the article they say, “ two other Latina Republicans,Monica De La Cruz in McAllen and Cassy Garcia in Laredo, are also on the ballot in congressional races along the Mexican border. All three — G.O.P. officials have taken to calling them a “triple threat” — share right-wing views on immigration, the 2020 election and abortion, among other issues. ” If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly to Michelle Vallejo: | Monica describes herself as a former Democrat who “walked away” from the party to cast her vote for Donald Trump because she believed he was “bringing to light the terrible things that we were doing to our country.” The reality is she didn’t just walk away from the party — but from the people of TX-15. Michelle, on the other hand, has been working with and alongside the people her entire life. She knows the people of this district and knows that they are ready for bold change, new vision, and real leadership. Michelle is “running in the most competitive House race in Texas,” a race gaining more and more attention due to just how critical this seat is for this district, Texas, and the entire country. It could mean the difference between whether we keep Democratic control or see yet another MAGA-minded politician in the House. ¡Si se puede! why we need to stop a GOP takeover
#
Peter,
The current 50-50 Senate means Mitch McConnell only needs to gain _ONE_ seat to take back control of the Senate — and national Republicans are doing everything they can to make that a reality by pouring money into races across the country, including here in Washington state.
**[We can’t let that happen. Chip in now to help stop the GOP takeover that we know will be disastrous for our families and fundamental rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47656304/355112776/529906150?refcode=pm_em_220710_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQ2ZDFlMy04YTAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D7wgvneZM7lQbPmjT-5SlS2gyHg-jj8adZmh58-OsfA=)**

Mitch McConnell is trying to bring the red wave to Washington state because he knows that Tiffany Smiley would be a rubber stamp for his extreme agenda and work with him instead of for the people of Washington state.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=3645%2E878179%2EwIuxdU). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=3645%2E878179%2EwIuxdU).**

Oh man, friends, we did not see this one coming:

body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

FIRST: Brian Kemp began the general election with a flood of negative ads
attacking Stacey and our campaign.

THEN: A new poll of Georgia voters showed this race is TIED, proving that
momentum is on our side when we share Stacey’s positive vision for One
Georgia.

BUT NOW: Politico is reporting that Kemp is massively stepping up his
fundraising to try and blunt this grassroots team’s momentum.

We have a path to victory in November, but it relies on continued and
sustained investments from committed
supporters like
you, Derek.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Cori Bush
body:
#
Peter,
**Cori Bush’s primary election in Missouri’s 1st district is in just 23 days.**
Cori is up against four primary opponents and we need to have her back before this critical primary election. Cori has been a strong progressive voice in Congress since day one. **Cori was our first ever JD recruit** ; we stood by her through two primary elections and she won big in 2020 with support from people like you, defeating an entrenched incumbent.
Cori’s corporate-backed opponent has started running attack ads and we need your support to help fight back, Peter. Cori’s final fundraising deadline before the August 2nd primary is in just three days.
[Will you split a $3 contribution between Cori Bush and Justice Democrats right now to help Cori defeat her corporate-backed opponent on August 2nd?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/111128?refcode=em20220710-24223&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=24223%2E1203867%2EyK-CwA)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/111128?refcode=em20220710-24223&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=24223%2E1203867%2EyK-CwA)**
In August of last year, Cori led a protest outside the U.S. Capitol Building to demand that the eviction moratorium be extended. She successfully pressured President Biden into taking action. That is just one example of the kind of leader Cori is and why we need her voice in Congress.
We can’t let the corporate-backed political establishment win this upcoming primary against Cori. Which is why Cori’s team is working to reach voters across the district but they need the resources to hire more organizers, run more ads across the district, and Get Out The Vote for Cori.
[Peter, will you help us defeat Cori’s corporate-backed opponent on August 2nd by splitting a contribution between JD and Cori’s campaign right now?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/111128?refcode=em20220710-24223&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=24223%2E1203867%2EyK-CwA)
Thank you so much for your support,
Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=24223%2E1203867%2EyK-CwA) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=24223%2E1203867%2EyK-CwA) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220710-24223-footer&t=24&refcode2=24223_1203867_yK-CwA&akid=24223%2E1203867%2EyK-CwA)**
---

10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=24223%2E1203867%2EyK-CwA)

name: Anna Brichacek, Campaign Manager
subject: 4 Months
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
Your commitments make a big difference
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47656649/355115876/-203487409?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.10_b1_abcm_all&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWRhNjAxMi04ZjAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8IdOifyw-qzxnIkudrKzzNuGjQRV158KEpBDf7EQTM0=) Hello Peter, It’s official: We are now **_less than 4 months away from Election Day!_** Things are moving quicker than ever, and that changes a lot about how we run this campaign. As Liz’s Campaign Manager, I can tell you that’s especially true when it comes to the budget. Our Finance Director Michael and I are tracking every dollar in and every dollar out more closely than ever before. Soon, we’ll even switch over from a monthly budget to a weekly budget! As I plan out our voter outreach investments over these last 4 months of our campaign, it helps to know _**exactly**_ how much money we have to work with. That’s why I want to ask today, [_**will you make a monthly recurring donation to support our campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47656650/355115877/597387788?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.10_b1_abcm_all&recurring=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWRhNjAxMi04ZjAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8IdOifyw-qzxnIkudrKzzNuGjQRV158KEpBDf7EQTM0=) | [**Donate Monthly**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47656651/355115878/790091439?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.10_b1_abcm_all&recurring=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWRhNjAxMi04ZjAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8IdOifyw-qzxnIkudrKzzNuGjQRV158KEpBDf7EQTM0=)
---

subject: Take a look at Buddy Carter’s record

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0710 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0710]
Peter –
As a 30-year career politician, Buddy Carter claims to be a concerned representative for this district. He claims to support working people. And he claims to be an advocate for Georgia families.
Yet Buddy votes against helping Americans every chance he gets:
Voted AGAINST bill to stop gas companies from price gouging
Voted AGAINST bill to cap insulin at $35/month
Voted AGAINST bill for funding to help boost the supply of baby formula
Voted AGAINST the bipartisan & commonsense gun safety bill
And here’s the kicker – he made these decisions while sitting as one of the wealthiest members of Congress.
It is time to elect someone who cares about our community & our families and it is time to get rid of an insurrectionist who has been in power for far too long. This November, we can do that together.
If you share our belief that we need a representative who holds the interests of our community at heart, please donate to our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022]
We’re fighting for better leadership and representation than we will ever get from Buddy Carter, and we’re thankful to have you on our team.
Let’s win this.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: You’ll want to read this
body:
Public education today is failing our nation’s young people—and their parents.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z81tb5soqlo5h7mb6rn1bnv1l665pb5oqk4m8sd8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpr0s9gs2q70pb6mpi7cdlimoq33cli6gr60slimkon8spnmooe4s3kslprcslgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pbbcj7mtimcd34mdgmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933cljm2o75c1i64oh5u)
|
---
| | Hello, Public education today is failing our nation’s young people—and their parents. As each generation moves on from the public school system, more and more Americans are growing unaware of our country’s great history and civic traditions. But unfortunately, civics and history are too often forgotten or overlooked in the 21st century. That’s why I am committed to having conversations with thought leaders around the country and providing educational resources for Americans. But an educated citizenry is essential to self-government—and the future of freedom. That’s why I’ve issued a challenge to patriots like you to read—or re-read—the Declaration of Independence as part of our More Perfect Union Project. Because this important historical document is so rich with wisdom and eternal truths, I’ve asked my team at ACI to put together a helpful guide that offers a clear and exclusive analysis of this piece of history.
[And I’m emailing you today to make sure you get a free copy of this latest eBook: _Breaking Down the Declaration_.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrdbrtmfi34me3900q0pdacf32qd9pc9dtvso7vg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c5geao34c9h2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z01oocvijjbnldn3ne40jnem8qeoht6p8db4n0g0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c5geao34c9h2bs)
When you read this book, you'll discover:
* The historical context surrounding the Declaration of Independence and why our Founders drafted it
* The 3 essential elements of the Declaration and what they meant for the establishment of our nation
* How many of King George's original offenses are being repeated by our own government today

You can get your free copy using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/breaking-down-the-declaration/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjg7ttsa5v2okosbqjv5n4pjflls7tvenbf8iqhg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c5geao34c9h2bs) And I hope you’ll share it with your family, friends, and anyone you know in our younger generations.
If we’re going stop history from repeating itself, it is critical that we educate as many people as possible. I really hope you enjoy this book. Please use this link to get instant access right now: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/breaking-down-the-declaration/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za511lkd453toiv7mc98fsqtc80f31b2qbi6rlto_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c5geao34c9h2bs)
Regards, Dr. Ben Carson
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---

name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: un4gettable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Biiiiiiig milestone.
#
Derek,
We're officially **less than four months way from** Election Day.
That may seem like a long time. But it’s not.
For a campaign that is as important as this one, the only thing that’s guaranteed is time flying by. We only have:
4️⃣ months to reach as many PA voters as possible.
4️⃣ months left to keep our ads on the air + online.
4️⃣ months to grow this movement to record-breaking volumes.
4️⃣ months to out-raise and out-organize Dr. Oz so we can flip PA Blue.
Can you help John Fetterman get it done?
[**We can’t do it without you. Can you make your first donation of $5 right now to help us sprint through these final four months and stay ahead of Dr. Oz?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48335?refcode=em20220710-6473&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6473%2E434096%2EG4bW_x)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48335?refcode=em20220710-6473&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=6473%2E434096%2EG4bW_x)**
We know our message of progress, hope, and determination speaks to the people of PA — just like it has in every county John + Gisele have visited on this campaign. The polls prove it, our 67-county primary victory proves it, and the size of our grassroots movement proves it: John can beat Dr. Oz and the MAGA money machine in November.
But he can’t do it alone, Derek.
[**That’s why it’s so important that you make a donation of $5 today so we can continue growing this movement across PA and carry our momentum to November.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48335?refcode=em20220710-6473&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=6473%2E434096%2EG4bW_x)
Thank you for your constant support and enthusiasm as we enter the last four months of this campaign. Let’s win this, together.
—John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220710-6473-footer&t=22&refcode2=6473_434096_G4bW_x&akid=6473%2E434096%2EG4bW_x)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=6473%2E434096%2EG4bW_x)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=6473%2E434096%2EG4bW_x)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: Impeach Kavanaugh & Gorsuch for lying under oath during their confirmation hearings
body:
They lied to the Senate about Roe v. Wade
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, During their confirmation hearings, Trump-appointed Supreme Court Justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh testified under oath that _Roe v. Wade_ was settled precedent. **Then, they overturned ****_Roe v. Wade_****.** [**Sign the petition to Congress: Impeach Supreme Court Justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh for lying under oath about abortion rights.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T840e3a14-0ef2-40f1-a2b6-0805c63fe867/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) In his [confirmation hearings](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20d4944f-c638-441a-8bd7-a1856168bf69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in 2017, Gorsuch claimed that _Roe_ is precedent: precedent being the “anchor of law” and “the starting place for a judge,” in his own words. He also stated that he accepts the law of the land and that “A good judge will consider [_Roe_] as precedent of the U.S. Supreme Court worthy as treatment of precedent like any other.” Kavanaugh followed a similar line in his confirmation hearings in 2018, clearly stating that “[_Roe_] is settled as a precedent of the Supreme Court...it has reaffirmed it many times.” He also explained that while he listens to all arguments, “Precedent is critically important. It is the foundation of our system.” **We saw through their lies during their hearings, but that doesn’t nullify the fact that two Supreme Court justices perjured themselves under oath. Now that the final ruling is out, we have the evidence to prove it.**
---
|
---
| | | | [SIGN THE PETITION: IMPEACH JUSTICES GORSUCH & KAVANAUGH](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38dcd066-5b2b-4cc2-800c-bd7cbdbae57d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | It would take a majority of the House and two-thirds of the Senate to vote yes, but a Supreme Court justice _can_ be impeached for lying under oath. We must use all possible avenues available to us to respond to this unconscionable decision—including urging Congress to begin the impeachment process. [**Sign the petition to Congress: Impeach Supreme Court Justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh for lying under oath about abortion rights.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a37a227-b24d-43c6-9e79-623f7d610456/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://default.salsalabs.org/T155305e2-a080-48e4-b50d-b6e02532fecd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | **PS** \- **[Your $2, $11, or $27 donation will help us keep Blue Amp going, bringing you a selection of progressive civic action on a range of topics, and good Democratic candidates to support from all around the country!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b368cfb-456c-4d1c-bb11-7426c101580a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---

name: Mark Warner
subject: Down, but not out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We can’t give up the fight for reproductive rights

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47656896/355117264/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzQ2MTU0NS05MzAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hzXm6r_xeR8zNOkMELoIpOgXHKH4f-cDdZvO5ddFIuI=&emci=678ce875-02ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=73461545-9300-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek,

It’s been two weeks since the Supreme Court’s appalling decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. In a very short period of time, the ground dropped out from underneath so many people who deserve to have control over their reproductive rights.

The answer to what comes next is both difficult and uncertain. Those in need of abortion services face unimaginable decisions with access to the care they need significantly restricted. Many others wonder what will happen if they need such care in the future.

Several states have already implemented restrictions or outright bans on abortions. Here in Virginia, Republicans have pledged to implement a 15-week ban if their party regains control of the General Assembly.

But in this new era of overwhelming uncertainty, I want you to know that I am still fighting as hard as I can to protect reproductive rights for as many people as possible. And I want to share a couple of updates with you.

First is the Women’s Health Protection Act. This bill would codify into law a right to abortion services. It would nullify the Supreme Court’s recent opinion on the matter. The House has already passed the bill, and I am a sponsor in the Senate.

But that isn’t the only thing we can do on this issue. I recently joined several of my colleagues in demanding Google take action to prevent anti-abortion clinics from showing up in search results when people seek information about getting an abortion. These so-called "crisis pregnancy centers" pose as abortion clinics in order to take advantage of people who are looking for legitimate reproductive health care.

Derek, we have suffered a devastating setback that is going to harm many people. It’s why I am redoubling my efforts to secure reproductive rights. I really and truly believe this fight is not over. It is not something we can overcome in a matter of days or weeks. But I’ll fight as long and as hard as I need to for you and yours to have the right to make personal decisions about your own health care.

Thank you,

Mark P.S. My campaign is working hard to elect pro-choice champions here in Virginia, and to expand our majority in the Senate. [_**If you can, please chip in $5 to these efforts today**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47656897/355117266/-1192105140?refcode=mw_em_220710_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzQ2MTU0NS05MzAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hzXm6r_xeR8zNOkMELoIpOgXHKH4f-cDdZvO5ddFIuI=)**. **A blue Senate and a blue House are crucial to this work. **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47656898/355117267/-1192105140?refcode=mw_em_220710_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzQ2MTU0NS05MzAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hzXm6r_xeR8zNOkMELoIpOgXHKH4f-cDdZvO5ddFIuI=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: Need your input...
body:
(CONVENTION) |
---
| | Hey there,

The 2022 IDGOP State Convention is this coming weekend in Twin Falls...

I'm going because it's time we get the state party _in order._

I'm also a delegate on the "Platform committee" which means I get to vote on the state's official platform.

_This is where you come in..._

The things we'll be voting on are **[here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=84a49e8edf&e=dea908e0fe "See the platform proposals")**.

If you're a Republican in Idaho... what do you think?

I'd love to get your feedback/input before I go.

It's gonna be a fun couple of days.

Thanks,

Brian

**P.S.** If you're REALLY interested, [here's a list of the attendees](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=702da00af2&e=dea908e0fe "See who's going"), [here's a list of what's up for a vote on the resolutions committee](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=aa08e5591f&e=dea908e0fe "Resolution proposals"), and [here's a list of what's up for a vote on the rules committee](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=7a79bae5ba&e=dea908e0fe "Proposed rules").

**P.P.S.** I still can't believe [this guy](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=46d40f72f5&e=dea908e0fe ""Repeat the line"") is sitting in the Oval Office... God help us.

---
| | _Copyright © 2022 Brian Lenney for Idaho, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Brian Lenney for IdahoPO Box 3753Nampa, ID 83653-3753
[Add us to your address book](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=8e0f6bc995) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=8e0f6bc995).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&afl=1)

The Pittsburgh International Airport right here in PA-17 is getting a $20 million federal investment for the construction of a new terminal. **This is all thanks to the bipartisan infrastructure bill that House Democrats passed last year!**

This construction will create jobs and bring an economic boost to the area, as the new terminal will allow for more flights in and out of Pittsburgh.

**But here’s the kicker, Derek: More than 90% of Republicans in the House voted against the infrastructure bill that’s delivering for western PA. The radical right isn’t interested in governing, and they’re not interested in rebuilding our region’s crumbling infrastructure.**

clean_body: This construction will create jobs and bring an economic boost to the area, as the new terminal will allow for more flights in and out of Pittsburgh. | = Hi Derek, did you see the news? The Pittsburgh International Airport right here in PA-17 is getting a $20 million federal investment for the construction of a new terminal. This is all thanks to the bipartisan infrastructure bill that House Democrats passed last year! This construction will create jobs and bring an economic boost to the area, as the new terminal will allow for more flights in and out of Pittsburgh. But here’s the kicker, Derek: More than 90% of Republicans in the House voted against the infrastructure bill that’s delivering for western PA. The radical right isn’t interested in governing, and they’re not interested in rebuilding our region’s crumbling infrastructure. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. She wants to ensure that American voices are heard and represented in DC, and that is why she is not taking a cent from corporate donors or Super PACs. Sarah’s humble beginnings have made her understand what it's like for the American people, suffering from economic shocks, inequity and financial barriers.No one in the richest country in the world should go bankrupt in order to survive cancer, nor should anyone be in debt for the rest of their life because they want upward mobility and education. America's young people deserve the chance to start families without buckling under the weight of childcare costs. It is time for the people to rise up, come together, and demand more.

So, Sarah wants to hear from YOU. What issue is most important to you?? **Let us know!**

clean_body: | | | Hey Peter,Sarah is a different kind of Democrat. She wants to ensure that American voices are heard and represented in DC, and that is why she is not taking a cent from corporate donors or Super PACs. Sarah’s humble beginnings have made her understand what it's like for the American people, suffering from economic shocks, inequity and financial barriers.No one in the richest country in the world should go bankrupt in order to survive cancer, nor should anyone be in debt for the rest of their life because they want upward mobility and education. America's young people deserve the chance to start families without buckling under the weight of childcare costs. It is time for the people to rise up, come together, and demand more. So, Sarah wants to hear from YOU. What issue is most important to you?? Let us know! Sarah is focused on finding community-based, people-centric solutions here in NY-22. She is fighting for Americans whose voices have been long ignored in DC. It is time to end the corporate bailouts and corrupt legislation that benefits the ultra-rich and ignores the needs of the American public.Sarah is ready to take on her opponents to fight for an end to corruption and a revival of democracy.Solidarity,Hood HQ ** Sarah Hood is a mom, wife, leader, problem solver, and Air Force veteran. She's running for Congress to fix our sidewalks and roads, fight for a fair economy and greater access to healthcare, and defend the foundations of our democracy that are under attack. **** Follow Sarah Online: Paid for by Sarah Klee Hood for NY **

body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, have you
seen this?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18317?c0=20220710.KkDq-L&refcode=em20220710-2202&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=2202%2E346206%2ECaPqxC ][IMG]

It’s our Team Booker yard sign! There’s only a couple months left until
the election, so we want to make sure we cover as many yards as possible
with Team Booker signs.

Putting up our yard signs from the Hood to the Holler is a powerful way of
showing that Team Booker is everywhere and we’re proud to be part of this
historic movement to turn Kentucky blue.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18317?c0=20220710.KkDq-L&refcode=em20220710-2202&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=2202%2E346206%2ECaPqxC ]It costs $16 to print a new yard sign. Will you chip in $16 or anything
you can right now so we can put in a new order for yard signs to
distribute across Kentucky?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18317?c0=20220710.KkDq-L&refcode=em20220710-2202&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=2202%2E346206%2ECaPqxC ]Contribute $16

Putting up a sign in someone’s front yard can have a powerful ripple
effect.

It can start conversations with your friends and neighbors. It shows the
people driving by how big of a movement Team Booker is, and it can even
lead to someone Googling “Who is Charles Booker?”

That’s why we’re so excited to print out more yard signs and start seeing
them pop up all over Kentucky.

But in order for us to keep printing and putting in orders for yard signs
we need to increase our campaign budget and raise more money to cover the
charges.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18317?c0=20220710.KkDq-L&refcode=em20220710-2202&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=2202%2E346206%2ECaPqxC ]Donating even just $16 can help us print out more campaign signs and
spread Charles’ message across our front yards.

Let’s do this,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220710-2202-footer&t=1023&refcode2=2202_346206_CaPqxC&akid=2202%2E346206%2ECaPqxC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2202%2E346206%2ECaPqxC

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Peter, It’s been two weeks since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and stripped millions of Americans of their constitutional rights to an abortion. All of us here on Team Emilia are still heartbroken and outraged, but more determined than ever to fight back. [**There is no time for inaction here. It is critical that Congress takes swift action to codify _Roe_. Look, millions of women across the country are going to suffer from SCOTUS’ disgraceful decision – including many right here in Ohio where a six week abortion ban was immediately enacted, restricting access to reproductive healthcare across the state.
_In fact, Republican state lawmakers in Ohio are considering even more extreme legislation that would further restrict a woman's right to make decisions about her body. _
**And with the support of Mike DeWine, who has proudly boasted that he is the “most pro-life governor in Ohio history,” it’s clear that Ohio Republicans will stop at nothing to roll back our constitutional rights. **
**Peter, this is exactly why we need to elect pro-choice champions like Emilia who will fight to protect the right to choose at the federal level.**
[**So, please, will you stand with Emilia in demanding that Congress codify _Roe v. Wade_ and protect our most basic freedoms at the federal level?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47657315/355119229/-2095135826?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmU0ZTc3MS05ODAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4U2z-D7PEbk7xRdfgV0dYRD6aQ0Csh_8VKxKAV81PNY=&emci=82127066-cefe-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=8be4e771-9800-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11703046)

Please, click here to contribute now »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47657598/355120943/1652904265?amount=3&refcode=GLFC_20220710_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2QwMTRhOC05YjAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wcs9O5bNCjmRBT4_bi4jkQbcd1-8huJnVaSLONIG2rs=)

I’ve said this before, team, but it’s worth saying again: _This is one of the most competitive, targeted districts in the country._

So, as we inch closer to our election in a few months’ time, I need to lay out what’s on the line:
* **Abortion and reproductive rights.** The far‐right is eroding women’s healthcare, and when I’m in Congress, I will fight to codify Roe into law.

* **The fabric of our democracy.** It’s no secret that Republicans want to tear down voting rights, divide us, and so much more — that’s why it’s vital we protect and expand our Democratic majority.

* **Our communities.** I know Southwest Ohio deserves better than Rep. Chabot. On the Cincinnati City Council, I fight day and night for children and families and I vow to do the same in Congress.

For all these reasons and more, friend, I’m giving this race my all. But in order to flip this seat from red to blue, it’s going to take all of us!

name: Doug Mastriano
subject: I need you standing in my corner right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60769538:6QMXLgoNx:m:1:3253819041:01D7637CD749C3D745049B1B6DE7F907:r)
---
| Peter,
I'm Doug Mastriano. I'm an _America First conservative_ running for Governor of Pennsylvania and, in our State Senate right now, **I 'm leading the charge to SECURE Election Integrity nationwide for 2024.**
My reforms will **ensure free and fair elections** moving forward...and **[they've already attracted high praise from President Trump:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60769538:6QMXLgoNx:m:1:3253819041:01D7637CD749C3D745049B1B6DE7F907:r)** | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60769538:6QMXLgoNx:m:1:3253819041:01D7637CD749C3D745049B1B6DE7F907:r)
---
| Fact is, a Republican _cannot win the White House in 2024_ unless **we first STOP Pennsylvania Democrats ' efforts to illegally rewrite our election laws, like they did in 2020.**
President Trump knows it. I know it. And Democrats nationwide know it too.
If you support **free elections in this nation** (and if you want to see a conservative have a _fair shot_ in 2024), **[I need you standing in my corner right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60769538:6QMXLgoNx:m:1:3253819041:01D7637CD749C3D745049B1B6DE7F907:r)**
**[Will you join the fight with $25 or more to fund this campaign and fuel this fight?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60769538:6QMXLgoNx:m:1:3253819041:01D7637CD749C3D745049B1B6DE7F907:r)** | | | | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60769538:6QMXLgoNx:m:1:3253819041:01D7637CD749C3D745049B1B6DE7F907:r)
---
My plan to secure Election Integrity and restore confidence in voting is simple but effective:
* Immediately **end all contracts with compromised voting machine companies,**

* **Appoint a Secretary of State with experience** in securing elections from fraud,

* **Ban the use of private funds** (like Zuckerbucks) designed to influence our elections.

My race here in Pennsylvania is **one of the biggest TOSS-UP races of 2022**...and the latest poll has me trailing by just a couple points: **49-46**.

Considering we're running against a career politician with deep pockets and the full support of the Democrat Establishment and their allies in the Leftist Media, **we 're _exactly_ where we need to be right now... but we've got a lot of work to do between now and November.**

If you care about Election Integrity we as conservatives have GOT to start electing people on a state-level who are willing to fight to secure this Republic.

**I 'm that guy here in Pennsylvania.** I've got the momentum, I've got the support, and I've even got President Trump's endorsement.

But I _can 't_ win without your help. **[Will you pitch in $25 or more to help me WIN and make sure the 2024 Presidential Election is SECURE?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60769538:6QMXLgoNx:m:1:3253819041:01D7637CD749C3D745049B1B6DE7F907:r)**

**[Pitch in $25 or more right away (every dollar helps!)>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60769538:6QMXLgoNx:m:1:3253819041:01D7637CD749C3D745049B1B6DE7F907:r)**

Doug Mastriano

name: Adam Schiff
subject: We are better than this.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| At times like this, I think back to two giants in the Congress, who stood taller than any of us could ever hope to, and who fought for what was right, no matter what.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=365%2E5257348%2EWADHDz)
Derek — I’m going to be honest, it’s been a long day, month and year (okay, few years).
At times like this, I think back to two giants in the Congress, who stood taller than any of us could ever hope to, and who fought for what was right, no matter what.
One of them you know well. When I first came to Congress, **John Lewis** exhorted us all to create "good trouble... necessary trouble.” I’d like to hope that in my limited time walking the Halls of Congress, I’ve done that in my own, much more limited, way.
But there’s another person I want to share a memory of with you today. His name was **Elijah Cummings**. And he was a giant too. He was our moral North Star, and a tremendous orator. I served with him on the Benghazi Select Committee (and my friendship with him was the only good thing to come out of that GOP political exercise). We lost Elijah much too soon, but when I close my eyes I can still hear his booming voice.
I learned so much from Elijah. Not just how to be a leader in Congress. But how to focus on what really matters. Not the partisan fight of the day in DC, but that higher cause.
_Our democracy. Our values. Our nation’s very soul._
Elijah — who my son shares a name with — liked to remind us that we aren’t powerless, even in the face of great difficulty. That we could overcome. That our country was worth it.
_Because as he always said, America is better than this. We are better than this. We are._
Let’s prove him **right**. Because **we do** have the power to determine our own destiny.
— Adam
[DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jul2022_abs_em.4MLSU6&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20220710_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=365%2E5257348%2EWADHDz)
---
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=365%2E5257348%2EWADHDz) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=365%2E5257348%2EWADHDz)**

name: Jodi Picoult
subject: I can barely find the words to express my rage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Today, words just won’t cut it, so I’m taking action.
| | |
---
I am disgusted – _Roe v. Wade_**** is over. I can barely find the words to express my rage – AND I’M A WRITER!

Overnight, I’ve been told that I matter less and I can’t be trusted to make health decisions about my own body.

Now, words just won’t cut it, so I’m taking action.

**I am supporting my friend Maggie Hassan’s campaign in New Hampshire, and I hope you will too.**
A nationwide abortion ban is on the table. Mitch McConnell, Kevin McCarthy, and the entire Republican party will keep trying to dismantle a woman’s rights – they’ve been trying to for decades. They will punish women and doctors. They will not stop.

And neither can we.

**We must organize, speak up, stand up, and do whatever we can to fight back.**

New Hampshire’s Senate race is the No. 1 most important election this year – it will determine control of the Senate, and with it, control of women’s bodies.

**[Please, donate $3 or whatever you can to Maggie Hassan’s campaign. It’s time for all of us to get involved.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47657805/355121790/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmE5M2Q1Yi05YzAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LyCt1w1jUwaKw_E96ZgUcmHQEPb7CBN60M4dvg62D6M=)**
Thank you for being in this fight.

Jodi Picoult

_Jodi Picoult is a #1 New York Times best-selling author, longtime advocate, and New Hampshire resident. Some of Picoult's best known works include "Wish You Were Here" and "My Sister's Keeper," which was adapted into a feature film. Picoult currently resides in Hanover, New Hampshire, with her husband._

clean_body: Today, words just won’t cut it, so I’m taking action. | | | I am disgusted – Roe v. Wade** is over. I can barely find the words to express my rage – AND I’M A WRITER! Overnight, I’ve been told that I matter less and I can’t be trusted to make health decisions about my own body. Now, words just won’t cut it, so I’m taking action. I am supporting my friend Maggie Hassan’s campaign in New Hampshire, and I hope you will too. A nationwide abortion ban is on the table. Mitch McConnell, Kevin McCarthy, and the entire Republican party will keep trying to dismantle a woman’s rights – they’ve been trying to for decades. They will punish women and doctors. They will not stop. And neither can we. We must organize, speak up, stand up, and do whatever we can to fight back. New Hampshire’s Senate race is the No. 1 most important election this year – it will determine control of the Senate, and with it, control of women’s bodies. = Thank you for being in this fight. Jodi Picoult Jodi Picoult is a #1 New York Times best-selling author, longtime advocate, and New Hampshire resident. Some of Picoult's best known works include "Wish You Were Here" and "My Sister's Keeper," which was adapted into a feature film. We need the Equal Rights Amendment more than ever to guarantee equality under the law, regardless of sex or gender.
38 states have ratified the ERA since 1972 – enough to add it to our Constitution. It hasn’t become law yet because of an arbitrary time limit on ratification.
**The House, despite a NO vote from Derek Marshall’s opponent, has already passed a bill to remove the time limit on ratifying the ERA. Now, it’s up to the Senate. **
**[Stand with Derek’s campaign and sign the petition: ratify the ERA now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47655613/355108039/-645121305?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220709_01%26noskip%3Dtrue%26redirect%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWRhNjNkZS04MjAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fGMJeXNHzzAQ3J2fPQCz_DxVaDu9dniE2h46pTHOuQc=&emci=31ce6de9-8000-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=aada63de-8200-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**
A 2022 Data for Progress survey shows a whopping 85% of Americans support the ERA – including 79% of Independents and 79% of Republicans.
**Republicans like Rep. Jay Obernolte that voted NO on the ERA are so extreme, they’re even out of touch with their own party.**
**[It’s long past time we guaranteed equality in the Constitution to all genders.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47655614/355108040/-645121305?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220709_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWRhNjNkZS04MjAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fGMJeXNHzzAQ3J2fPQCz_DxVaDu9dniE2h46pTHOuQc=&emci=31ce6de9-8000-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=aada63de-8200-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**
Sign the petition: ratify the ERA now!
Thanks for standing up.
– Marshall for Congress

In several states where litigation is pending -- including NDRC targets like North Carolina, Ohio, Texas, and others -- it’s possible that new maps will need to be drawn before the 2024 elections. So we’re investing in new technologies, data, and mapping innovations to make sure we’re prepared.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47658257/355124099/-507439490?amount=20&refcode=20220710.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3NjFkMjA5LWE0MDAtZWQxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sXVNFbqDKO4NCdKE9DsrBcos-xwBqGH3taoYN9TkkeE=)[PITCH IN TO HELP US KEEP IT UP](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47658258/355124100/-507439490?amount=20&refcode=20220710.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3NjFkMjA5LWE0MDAtZWQxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sXVNFbqDKO4NCdKE9DsrBcos-xwBqGH3taoYN9TkkeE=)
**2\. Double Down On Redistricting Reforms**
In 2018 and 2020, we helped pass groundbreaking redistricting reforms in states like Colorado and Michigan that were instrumental in stopping the GOP from gerrymandering in those places. Moving forward, we plan to build on these successes to achieve bold reforms in even more states.
[PITCH IN TO SUPPORT OUR WORK](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47658259/355124101/-507439490?amount=20&refcode=20220710.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3NjFkMjA5LWE0MDAtZWQxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sXVNFbqDKO4NCdKE9DsrBcos-xwBqGH3taoYN9TkkeE=)
**3\. Target Elections Key to Redistricting**
All over the country, the GOP is ramping up their efforts to target races, including state court elections, in an effort to elect judges and other officials they believe will rubber stamp gerrymandered maps. That means we need to prepare for the long term by electing pro-democracy leaders.

The good news is our work in 2018 and 2020 made a big difference for Democrats running for state-level offices. In Pennsylvania, Kansas, and Wisconsin, Democratic governors who we supported ended up vetoing manipulated maps. And this year, we’re targeting even more races in 17 states that will have a big impact on the future of redistricting.
[PITCH IN TO HELP US](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47658260/355124102/-507439490?amount=20&refcode=20220710.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3NjFkMjA5LWE0MDAtZWQxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sXVNFbqDKO4NCdKE9DsrBcos-xwBqGH3taoYN9TkkeE=)

name: Charles Booker
subject: Rand Paul does not give a damn about our safety or survival.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

I received the news of the massacre at an elementary school in Uvalde,
Texas as I picked up my 6-year-old daughter from school.

Watching children exit school and reuniting with their parents after their
school day was gut wrenching. So many parents in Texas will never pick up
their child from school again.

And in the weeks that have followed, the same tragedy struck again and
again — as 7 people were killed and dozens injured on July 4 in Highland
Park, Illinois, and even here in Kentucky, where three police officers and
a police dog were killed and four others were injured. Enough is enough.
This needs to end.

We can’t keep accepting inaction. Every member of Congress who refuses to
act on common sense gun safety needs to resign right now.

There's no reason the Senate can’t pass gun safety legislation to protect
our children.

That’s why I’m running against Rand Paul, a Senator with a 92% NRA rating
who’s accepted more money from the gun lobby than any other Senate
candidate this year. Rand Paul has made it clear that he will always vote
to please his friends from the gun lobby and make reform untenable.

He’s previously threatened to filibuster legislation banning assault
rifles, the weapon used in recent mass shootings in Uvalde and Buffalo.
Following Sandy Hook in 2012, Rand Paul went on national television and
spoke in opposition to background checks. This week is no different, as
Paul remains content using words, rather than power granted to him by the
people of Kentucky, to protect our children. His thoughts and prayers are
meaningless.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220710.szQoHc&refcode=em20220710-2205&t=1020&akid=2205%2E346206%2EFTZeRd ]Thoughts and prayers aren’t enough, and we don’t have to accept them
any longer. Will you help me retire Rand Paul this November by chipping in
today?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220710.szQoHc&refcode=em20220710-2205&t=1021&akid=2205%2E346206%2EFTZeRd ]Contribute $5

Peter, I have
directly seen and felt the impact of gun violence. On Easter Sunday in
2016, my younger cousin TJ was shot and killed during an attempted
robbery. And since then, I’ve lost another cousin to gun violence each
year.

Guns are the leading cause of death for children in the U.S., and I’m
determined to dismantle the corrupt foundation that the gun lobby has
entrenched with Congressional Republicans. Now more than ever, legislative
and executive action is necessary to prevent future mass killings, of our
children or otherwise.

I believe we deserve to live in peace. I believe weapons of war should not
be in our classrooms or in our streets. But Rand Paul does not give a damn
about our safety or survival.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220710.szQoHc&refcode=em20220710-2205&t=1022&akid=2205%2E346206%2EFTZeRd ]Peter, we
don’t have to keep accepting inaction from Senate Republicans like Rand
Paul and Mitch McConnell. Will you chip in $5 right now to
show Rand Paul that this movement is rising up to end his political
career?

Thank you,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220710-2205-footer&t=1023&refcode2=2205_346206_FTZeRd&akid=2205%2E346206%2EFTZeRd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2205%2E346206%2EFTZeRd

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelly=20Schulz?=
subject: I know what it's like
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3f9c41982868/announcing-watermen-for-kelly-11818511?e=64ac72257a)
---
| | [ ](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=49c3a5e4f5&e=64ac72257a)
---
| |
# Dear Peter,
We live in unsettling times. Inflation is out of control, gas prices continue to soar and violent crime is plaguing our country.

I know that it's like to worry. And I know what it's like to fight for everything you have.
---
| [ ](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=f557de4095&e=64ac72257a)
---
| **As your governor, I will fight for every hardworking Marylander. Your voice and your struggles are the most important thing to me because my job is to do everything I can to look out for you and your family. **

Early voting is underway until July 14th from 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM.

[**Early voting locations are located in every county and can be found online here**](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=91bb148313&e=64ac72257a).

I know that together we can not only win on July 19th, but we can win in November.

[Can you chip in $25, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 today?](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=820094eb78&e=64ac72257a)

**Your trust is my priority. And I promise to always have your back. **

Thank you,
---
|
---
| **Kelly Schulz**
Candidate for Governor
---
|
---
|
---

Hello,
The January 6th insurrection and the GOP’s feckless decision to stand by Donald J. Trump is proof enough: There is a Cold War raging for the future of our democracy, and ‘General’ McConnell and ‘Lieutenant’ Grassley are fighting for the wrong side.
I served our country for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. I swore an oath to defend our Constitution against all threats – foreign _and_ domestic. **I’m now running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because I can’t think of anything more un-American than gleefully accepting the endorsement of a deranged man who tried to overthrow 232 years of peaceful transfer of power. It’s time to call it what it was: Treason.**
The polls show I can win. The pundits say we _must_ win if we’re going to expand our Democratic Senate majority. But Grassley has already started slinging mud at me on TV, and I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I need _your_ help.
**We need to raise $35,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight to fight back, but right now we’re still $9,263 short. If I’m going to send Chuck Grassley packing and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give every dollar you can afford right now:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can spare before our critical deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47658623/355125356/-42398318?refcode=em20220710pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDQ3NTcyMi1hNjAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jFmF3TTCT_uomkVd7YOw2Rk4nnWQzv3SNeBeEvugqws=)

But Grassley has already started slinging mud at me on TV, and I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I need your help. We need to raise $35,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight to fight back, but right now we’re still $9,263 short. If I’m going to send Chuck Grassley packing and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give every dollar you can afford right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = When I defeat Chuck Grassley this November, I’ll be the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. You can be sure I’ll always fight to protect our democracy. I am so grateful for your support, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Kerri Keck
subject: Volunteers needed for Choctaw Pepper Festival on July 15
body:
Hello everyone! We need some volunteers willing to attend the Pepper Festival in Choctaw on Friday, July 15, 2022 from 6:00 - 8:00 PM. Volunteers will be in Madison Horn t-shirts and will be available to hand out literature. If anyone is interested, please respond to this email and provide your shirt size. Thank you for your support!

Kerri Keck
(405) 641-3883
[kerri@madisonhorn.com](mailto:kerri@madisonhorn.com)

name: Kyla Sabado
subject: Don’t miss this chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Peter,
Did you see this message from Jena the other day? I wanted to make sure you got a chance to read it over because this event is going to be a big deal. Senator Sherrod Brown is going to be joining Jena for a virtual event tomorrow at 5pm.
Senator Brown is an ally in the fight for voting rights. With Pam Anderson as Jena’s official opponent, we have no time to waste. Join us for this important and informative conversation!
RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jenajuly11?refcode=220710-email]Can’t wait to see you there.
–Kyla
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jenajuly11?refcode=220710-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jenajuly11?refcode=220710-email]
Peter,
We are hosting an event on July 11th with a very special guest. Former Secretary of State, current U.S. Senator, and fighter for voter and workers' rights, Sherrod Brown, will be joining me for a virtual event!
It would be an honor if you would attend this event so you can stay up-to-date with everything we are doing on the ground to protect the right to vote in Colorado.
Date: Monday, July 11
Time: 5:00 to 6:00 PM MT
Show your support for the campaign by joining us for this special virtual event!
RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jenajuly11?refcode=220710-email]
Looking forward to seeing you there.
Jena Griswold
My name is Jena Griswold. In 2018, I was elected as the first democratic Secretary of State in Colorado since 1958, the first democratic woman Secretary of State in Colorado’s history, and only the 10th woman in Colorado’s history to hold the statewide constitutional office of governor, attorney general, secretary of state, or treasurer!

name: AWFUL SCOTUS UPDATE (VPP)
subject: The Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=3651%2E878179%2EwO4U0X)._
---
**BREAKING: The Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_**

Thanks to Trump's far-right Supreme Court Justices (like Brett Kavanaugh), access to safe abortions and reproductive health care just took a major hit. | **_As a trusted Democrat in your city, we need to know what YOU think:_** [DO YOU APPROVE OF THE SUPREME COURT?](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220710_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=3651%2E878179%2EwO4U0X) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220710_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=3651%2E878179%2EwO4U0X) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220710_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=3651%2E878179%2EwO4U0X) | [NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220710_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=3651%2E878179%2EwO4U0X)
---|---
THIS POLL WILL CLOSE IN ONE HOUR -- YOUR RESPONSE IS DUE IMMEDIATELY UPON OPENING THIS EMAIL.
Look, thanks to the work of decades of Republican meddling, the Supreme Court is out of control! The far-right court is:

❌ GUTTING the Voting Rights Act
❌ FAILING to protect workers
❌ And now, they've destroyed _Roe v. Wade!_

We get sick to our stomachs thinking about justices like Brett Kavanaugh and Amy Coney Barrett -- _but we need to hear from our TOP supporters now!_
[DO YOU APPROVE OF THE SUPREME COURT?](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220710_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=3651%2E878179%2EwO4U0X) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220710_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=3651%2E878179%2EwO4U0X) | [NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220710_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=13&akid=3651%2E878179%2EwO4U0X)

Thank you,

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

But just because the holiday weekend is over doesn’t mean we should stop celebrating America.

We’re **proud to be Americans** , and we want to show the world that our citizens stand behind our great nation.

body:
If you have a couple of minutes today I invite you to sit down and read my July newsletter. We've got a lot going on! Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_s=2ccb26e860b54f7997aea4ee4198d20f&_t=FA4wrshi6kYr6bMrllQ6uFLtohsch0UaeXSbRCKOU7glZC1rDh-A4exp8hgiKo_r9Hj31gOmFTe4GFxHxJes6LYFGd9DTOxkDnDQ-imngZwKbcesWXZv4KF2szNaZU3Uga3Du7XNJJvJ7dkK1JBun_rSP5OE8I5pLgfVVEx5ToY%3D) | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=2ccb26e860b54f7997aea4ee4198d20f&_e=R7Rx8rwKsUKZXTx16ipL9nIrXr2fH5mpZSY8zpRKk3xDSm52PqfDxBsQpHc_kabeE9ytOw2cNrMQWvdaXoaZlXUOtOOyJaF4X0Osl9UAjpB45rBuFSDoLD3SKddCNdUo5idDDG-JX6qE2srUjeWZn0lopXuQjiIzlpN3inOyZ2ZhOifneKbQpI8noSehnnMPv6rI7aSn4-MUuaYAgo1dtr-8AiYPCntU2LEvxkJ_3RA6OCwz5iF5pYFSKK4BDso-2rDVKvwSOeOx5MPpaEmSaitwPqT5cm6wZ9fJ_3l1anm0qvj_2JeVOH8O7PZ-GqfFLowxAIktBpaT05Nb2B3ZLg%3D%3D)
---
Peter, There a lot of exciting things happening in Oregon this summer! Even if you don't live here - it's important you understand just how hard we're working to flip this seat RED for the first time since the 1970s. Please take five moments out of your day to read what me and my team were up to in June.

| [**Read My July Newsletter** **› › **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=2ccb26e860b54f7997aea4ee4198d20f&_e=R7Rx8rwKsUKZXTx16ipL9nIrXr2fH5mpZSY8zpRKk3xDSm52PqfDxBsQpHc_kabeE9ytOw2cNrMQWvdaXoaZlXUOtOOyJaF4X0Osl9UAjpB45rBuFSDoLD3SKddCNdUo6j4J0idgHr37JCWin4oZ4POVKw7MUHOLbDPAWID8C4YQwL4HA05b338diPoaJfJM2hCeWGBFkbWKPXKsWIbGetvIcQFb2QYfiBfZxvQOvTB56YI8RREPu2aSzWVgQeer7ZKiwEEHZiMFvAc-DhasDt-pAZIH4gxlLlj9dRqZ_ctDMnP_Ulsoj1bhKnKHu0ddv2hLaH8EgN99dEondPehmA%3D%3D)

We hope you find our newsletters both informative and interesting.

Thanks for sticking with me through thick and thin!

clean_body: If you have a couple of minutes today I invite you to sit down and read my July newsletter. We've got a lot going on! Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, There a lot of exciting things happening in Oregon this summer! Even if you don't live here - it's important you understand just how hard we're working to flip this seat RED for the first time since the 1970s. Please take five moments out of your day to read what me and my team were up to in June. | We hope you find our newsletters both informative and interesting. Thanks for sticking with me through thick and thin! Sincerely, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress Follow Alek On Social Media | ---|--- | Paid for by Alek for Oregon

Dear Friend,

We live in unsettling times. Inflation is out of control, gas prices continue to soar and violent crime is plaguing our country.

I know that it's like to worry. And I know what it's like to fight for everything you have.
---

**As your governor, I will fight for every hardworking Marylander. Your voice and your struggles are the most important thing to me because my job is to do everything I can to look out for you and your family. **

Early voting is underway until July 14th from 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM.

[**Early voting locations are located in every county and can be found online here**](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuGKixKtYgC0gqnvqvxF8BuYX1tdTZuPZu1T-2Fhjr-2FLQu7xO2KSLq6pEEEghYNeU2zGoWE1Ylqw0FyOeQVMhDutJPe-2BXVKmuFs0VidNvRd7XkueVsh_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6wsscnzm58WV8VW7sbomG-2FpBR50HyW2qteQH19WcIiowOcNlf-2BGJc-2B4g-2BOZXwFoDw9n0o0dBuGr-2F9e0EqqLNsIC85BbZUe1QmiZJtVBDVRckxeqBEjgnq8-2BD5SSqoMvFR6RE3jOorou0sXnJcRUbCeHk0nbHyuhnbHV9hVagCVsbqL3zNe9HqjbT7ZgDJxrsK8BCNIwGMmZ6bHtMqu48LIUBc0WszU0VCxRqJzoivhCtbT8yDP3fSbInPhTV3Rq9GVRydNTAwnX0xLg6dy08QTq4MEf3rICLXZ2z3ZuDCINfp0IXTl5m9yU8LznJcRk-2BnoZ4mSWCwuFZOYQw9gCmn9hSy0cBSonwSXbmLjdz8jJfM-2BmW652Th29nSTpu6E-2FrK5fp7-2BSZH0qLNZu0nKChTh7UkkK6y-2Fqxq58K-2FNaHu-2Fy7J3ToAFB-2FsbCQT5sqNPzWOD1tvAMOyO0VwpyA5j8uraTwnwUIHH8BcnPkGdIrOUQfcjnF0bnRGMCzXvmbIl-2BWZu5X1-2Fdz5hZ2JVcCrSWenptvRkiXixO4wx-2BsoYaAa5iJgJkXEEfpGkLq9XNnl3pTNQEx9HTjNdTySHCOB0rThjvOJk8Ejny5IJESo-2Brx1byh-2FzRXfTXHLPqPEK01SiIp-2FOG-2FSvNWYM1IFw8R8nbI2-2BPLHPzs7Jl0953bfElWNAvZNH9PpsFUGVpB0MmXqjdTugzch2H22WJNv0tu1yvGlDSRnczUu1HxcTEJtXn48jLCUNSXBR8fxBJt6J8WnEftLWaNNdNmdrWU9Eb39-2FkeIDJ2PY8-2B0bwgrAnx-2Bo2r6PeIcfQlQrQlBPOqqN4oyfD7wEke8oYoN2HbZ9qOHcwIfMw-3D-3D).

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, We live in unsettling times. Inflation is out of control, gas prices continue to soar and violent crime is plaguing our country. I know that it's like to worry. And I know what it's like to fight for everything you have. As your governor, I will fight for every hardworking Marylander. Your voice and your struggles are the most important thing to me because my job is to do everything I can to look out for you and your family. Early voting is underway until July 14th from 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM. . I know that together we can not only win on July 19th, but we can win in November. Your trust is my priority. And I promise to always have your back. Thank you, Kelly Schulz Candidate for Governor | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra
