name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This legal argument would get an "F" from me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
It deeply troubles me to think how six justices could care so little. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47659302/355131701/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ6O_SCO_E_20220710_V1S1_NOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA0YWQ5OS1hZDAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gVGGjHHU4uSW7ENmrhF_Dxa40ERVCiDQ-HLPikXqoCg=&emci=3b77a6d5-6400-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=da04ad99-ad00-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
The Supreme Court’s extreme conservative majority is out of touch, out of control, and creating a legitimacy crisis for themselves. The American people are losing confidence in the Court. And for good reason, with the Court’s dangerous decisions on abortion rights, climate action, gun safety, and more. They’re anti-union, they’re anti-consumer, and they've empowered corporations more than ever before — giving them religious liberty rights and letting them spend gobs of money to influence the political process. The Court is tossing aside settled law and saying they're just going to substitute their own personal views and make the rest of America bend to it. Pure and simple, a tiny group of far-right radicals are trying to impose their unpopular views on the rest of us. And they’re not stopping — Clarence Thomas already said he’s coming after the LGBTQ+ community and coming after contraception. And I’ll just say this: As a former law professor, if I were to grade the legal argument that was presented for overturning Roe v. Wade, it would get an F. This opinion basically cites a bunch of folks from the 1700s and says, "Boy, that's the way we want to go.” To a time when aristocrats ran the world. When the only people who had voices were white men. When slavery was a way to make money. It deeply troubles me to think how six justices could care so little about the people who will pay the price. So now is the time to be angry. And now is the time to channel that anger into action. Let’s remind ourselves the Supreme Court doesn't get the final word. The final word rests with We The People. So I’m going to keep fighting to rebalance this hijacked institution by expanding the Court — think of it as a democratic recalibration. Congress has already used that power seven times before, and it’s time to use it again. I’m also going to stay focused on holding onto the House and electing two more pro-choice, anti-filibuster Democratic senators — because that’s what we need to codify Roe nationwide and reverse the Court’s horrifying injustice. And we cannot let Republicans seize power. If they do, we’ve already seen their wishlist — and right at top, circled and underlined, is a nationwide ban on abortion. That means no safe havens anywhere. There is still a path out of this. It is not a guaranteed path, but I guarantee you this: You don't get what you don't fight for. So I’m staying in this fight all the way. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47659303/355131702/921386962?refcode=EMZ6O_SCO_E_20220710_V1S1_NOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA0YWQ5OS1hZDAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gVGGjHHU4uSW7ENmrhF_Dxa40ERVCiDQ-HLPikXqoCg=)

There are just 9 DAYS left until Primary Election Day, so I'm emailing you before the week starts...

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47659337/355134039/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220710-fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220710-fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220710&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=4ca20684-ae00-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2EyMDY4NC1hZTAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWxOWFZalPFpbugiw9pZnnAWID4X-9wM_bkJlQB41Lc=)

| Peter, **There are just 9 DAYS left until Primary Election Day**, so I'm emailing you before the week starts to tell you exactly why I got into this race and explain why we email you so much asking for your support. This is a longer email, so if you would rather take action now, [_**please consider giving just $10 to help us reach the over 20% of likely voters here in Maryland who are undecided and will decide this election >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47659338/355134040/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220710-fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220710-fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220710&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&&&&amount=10&refcode2=4ca20684-ae00-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2EyMDY4NC1hZTAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWxOWFZalPFpbugiw9pZnnAWID4X-9wM_bkJlQB41Lc=) My great-grandfather and his family were enslaved in a cabin not 25 miles from where I currently live with my wife and two daughters in Silver Spring. It’s difficult to fathom what my ancestors lived through, but because they survived with faith in a future they could not see, I am here today. Their perseverance ushered in new opportunities for entire generations to come and my family is the realization of their hope. And the thing is, not even in their wildest dreams could they have ever envisioned that just three generations later, their great-grandson would serve in the cabinet of our first Black President. **Now, I’m running for governor for them, and for every one of our predecessors who fought to make the American dream one we can all realize.** I’m running for you and your family. For your right to be true to who you are, whether by hanging a pride flag in your classroom or seeking life-saving gender-affirming care. For your right to decide if and when you are ready to start a family. For juvenile justice reform, worker protections, accessible public transit, world class public schools, and bold investments in affordable housing. **For a better Maryland for all of us.** **Let me be clear: we cannot wait to begin building a better future for our children.** The next governor of Maryland will be charged with determining what trajectory Maryland will take as we face the defining challenges of our lifetimes, from climate change to criminal justice reform to public health and safety. **I am up to the challenge and I am ready to lead our state on the path to progress.** But right now, I am relying on folks like you to help guide our campaign across the finish line. We have to hustle to raise the resources we need to spread the word about our campaign to undecided voters on the airwaves, through direct mail, at the doors, and online. [_**So if you are in a position to contribute today, please make a donation to support our campaign. Together, we can build a Maryland that works for everyone.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47659339/355134041/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220710-fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220710-fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220710&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=4ca20684-ae00-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2EyMDY4NC1hZTAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWxOWFZalPFpbugiw9pZnnAWID4X-9wM_bkJlQB41Lc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ | | [$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47659340/355134042/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220710-fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220710-fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220710&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&&&&express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode2=4ca20684-ae00-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2EyMDY4NC1hZTAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWxOWFZalPFpbugiw9pZnnAWID4X-9wM_bkJlQB41Lc=)

clean_body: There are just 9 DAYS left until Primary Election Day, so I'm emailing you before the week starts... | = | Peter, There are just 9 DAYS left until Primary Election Day, so I'm emailing you before the week starts to tell you exactly why I got into this race and explain why we email you so much asking for your support. This is a longer email, so if you would rather take action now, = My great-grandfather and his family were enslaved in a cabin not 25 miles from where I currently live with my wife and two daughters in Silver Spring. It’s difficult to fathom what my ancestors lived through, but because they survived with faith in a future they could not see, I am here today. Their perseverance ushered in new opportunities for entire generations to come and my family is the realization of their hope. And the thing is, not even in their wildest dreams could they have ever envisioned that just three generations later, their great-grandson would serve in the cabinet of our first Black President. Now, I’m running for governor for them, and for every one of our predecessors who fought to make the American dream one we can all realize. I’m running for you and your family. For your right to be true to who you are, whether by hanging a pride flag in your classroom or seeking life-saving gender-affirming care. For your right to decide if and when you are ready to start a family. For juvenile justice reform, worker protections, accessible public transit, world class public schools, and bold investments in affordable housing. For a better Maryland for all of us. Let me be clear: we cannot wait to begin building a better future for our children. The next governor of Maryland will be charged with determining what trajectory Maryland will take as we face the defining challenges of our lifetimes, from climate change to criminal justice reform to public health and safety. I am up to the challenge and I am ready to lead our state on the path to progress. But right now, I am relying on folks like you to help guide our campaign across the finish line. We have to hustle to raise the resources we need to spread the word about our campaign to undecided voters on the airwaves, through direct mail, at the doors, and online. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = With gratitude, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our _. * **Now** \-- The election experts at _Politico_ just DOWNGRADED Arizona to "toss-up" -- and **MSNBC says Sen. Kelly needs IMMEDIATE help to hold on!**

You know how important it is to keep Mark Kelly in the Senate and Mitch McConnell OUT of power. **President Biden’s ENTIRE agenda depends on winning this race and defending our Democratic majority! So please:**

subject: just follow the money, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4519%2E3611125%2E87uIo_ ][IMG]

Folks—if you want to know who JD Vance will serve if he’s
allowed to buy his way into Congress, all you’ve got to do is follow the
money.

I’m talking about the $15 million super PAC helping billionaires buy
influence, the Silicon Valley hacks flooding the race with dark money, and
Trump's far-right fundraising machine dangling carrots in front of their
show pony, JD.

The receipts don’t lie, folks—JD will kowtow to everything Peter
Thiel and Donald Trump say, because they’re the ones propping up his whole
campaign!

But Tim Ryan is committed to working for Ohio—he’s got what it takes to
win, and the polls right now are way too close to call. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16462?t=1009&amount=25&akid=4519%2E3611125%2E87uIo_ ]Can I count on
you to stand with Tim and chip in
$25 to his
campaign to flip Ohio blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16462?t=1010&amount=25&akid=4519%2E3611125%2E87uIo_ ]Chip in
$25

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16462?t=1011&amount=30&akid=4519%2E3611125%2E87uIo_ ]Other Amount

I’ve been in the game long enough to tell you that when you want answers
about a candidate, you look at the list of folks they’re indebted to.

We already know who’s backing JD—corporate billionaires, Silicon Valley
tech oligarchs, and disgraced former presidents. Now there’s a shady
bunch.

But Tim’s backed by more than 150,000 small donors, both in Ohio and
across the country, and THAT’S who he’ll be working for when he gets to
the Senate.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16462?t=1012&amount=25&akid=4519%2E3611125%2E87uIo_ ]Tim Ryan will always have Ohio’s back, and now it’s time we have
his—will you step up and chip in
$25 to
break the deadlock and give Ohioans another fighter in the Senate?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16462?t=1013&amount=25&akid=4519%2E3611125%2E87uIo_ ]Chip in
$25

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16462?t=1014&amount=30&akid=4519%2E3611125%2E87uIo_ ]Other Amount

Thanks,

James Carville

body:
| Team,

The radical Supreme Court’s decisions to end abortion rights, weaken gun control, and protect the worst industrial polluters from regulations is just the beginning of the dismantling of our freedom.

As President, he has the power to call for the expansion of the Supreme Court. President Roosevelt threatened just that when the corrupt, pro-business Supreme Court of his day blocked Social Security. It worked, and Social Security is now one of the most popular American programs.

**[Our Revolution is building a campaign to demand Joe Biden stop falling asleep at the wheel while fascists take away our rights and destroy democracy. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: The most robust grassroots team in Georgia history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

My campaign announced some incredible news earlier this week — since we
launched in December 2021, more than 240,000 grassroots donors have
chipped in $100 or less to help us win this election.

We’re building the most robust grassroots team in Georgia history and I’m
so thankful you are a part of it. Already, our team has been hard at work
training and mobilizing hundreds of volunteers who have contacted tens of
thousands of voters — and we’re just getting started.

There is still so much work to be done if we are going to hold Brian Kemp
accountable for his extremist actions. His fundraising is only going to
speed up from here, and that's why I am counting on this grassroots team
to keep fighting alongside me from now until November.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220710_B2_grassroots_S1_T1_SYA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=922%2E1862389%2EfozY8R ]So much is on the line, from voting rights to reproductive rights to
the safety of our communities and who has the opportunity to thrive. Can
you help us maintain our momentum with your
first contribution to
my campaign for governor?

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220710_B2_grassroots_S1_T1_SYA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=922%2E1862389%2EfozY8R ]DONATE

With less than four months left until Election Day, I am proud of the
strength of this grassroots team. We outraised an incumbent governor over
the past two months, but we have to outwork him every single day if we are
going to win.

That’s just what we’ve been doing. So far, this team has trained hundreds
of volunteers to organize their community and made over 30,000 phone calls
to Georgia voters. That’s what outworking Brian Kemp looks like, and we’re
just getting started.

Together, we have the power to change lives, to invest in every Georgian
and to build One Georgia, where all can thrive and succeed.

But first, we have to win. And to do that, I am counting on this
grassroots team to power our work every step of the way.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220710_B2_grassroots_S1_T1_SYA_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=922%2E1862389%2EfozY8R ]Help us hold Brian Kemp accountable at the ballot box by making your
first investment in my
campaign today. Any amount, no matter how big or small, makes a real
difference to me and our campaign.

Derek, I’m so
grateful you’re a part of this team,

Stacey

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=922%2E1862389%2EfozY8R ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=922%2E1862389%2EfozY8R

clean_body: Texas Democratic Congressional candidates across the state are joining forces for a one-night event in Dallas, TX. Join us! | | Hola Friend, Texas Democratic Congressional candidates across the state are joining forces for a one-night event in Dallas, TX. Join us! You are invited to attend the Texas Democratic Congressional Candidates Convention Social where 12 (and counting!) Democratic nominees will be sharing our common goals and field plans to win in November! When: Thursday, July 14, 2022 Time: 7:00 - 9:00PM CST Where: Dallas Tower Club located at 1601 Elm St., Dallas, TX on the 48th floor Tickets: Start at $50 and each donation will go to support 12 Texas Congressional Candidates Sponsorships: Start at $150 Will you support our Texas Congressional Democratic delegation today? Every dollar becomes invested throughout the entire state to flip it Blue! Mil gracias, friend! Team Zapata | | Claudia Zapata is a practical, progressive Democrat running for Congress in Texas’ 21st congressional district in Central Texas. We have a real opportunity to win this seat, but as long as we continue to believe that "Republican safe seats" are unwinnable, nothing will change. Our campaign is ready to get the job done. body:
Even without Roe, it’s possible to protect abortion access in Ohio – and electing a pro-choice governor who will fight for your rights is the first step.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47657196/355118465/1144435635?refcode=nw_em_templateheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDk3YzY1ZS05NTAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_FnclnMo3DFnuA4ajUINNLMd9DehthlPP_FkZI9V8-k=)

Team,
What do 59% of Ohioans have in common? We know a family member or friend who has had an abortion.
The vast majority of Ohioans support the right to the full range of reproductive care, including abortion.
But now, thanks to Mike DeWine and his ultra-conservative friends, almost all abortions have been banned, forcing people to go out of state to access care – even in the case of rape or incest. It’s disgusting, it’s dangerous, and we can’t stand for it.
**[Will you help us protect Ohioans and the right to reproductive care? Chip in $5 to elect Nan Whaley.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47657197/355118466/-419803747?refcode=nw_em_220710_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDk3YzY1ZS05NTAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_FnclnMo3DFnuA4ajUINNLMd9DehthlPP_FkZI9V8-k=)**
Thanks to Mike DeWine, we already have a six-week ban in effect – before most people even know they’re pregnant.
But even more extreme legislation is already being proposed, and there’s no way to know how far Republicans will take it.
Even without _Roe_ , it’s possible to protect abortion access in Ohio – and electing a pro-choice governor who will fight for your rights is the first step.
**[The majority of Ohioans agree: we should protect abortion access. Nan Whaley is ready to protect choice in Ohio. Donate $5 now if you’re ready to join her.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47657198/355118467/-419803747?refcode=nw_em_220710_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDk3YzY1ZS05NTAwLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_FnclnMo3DFnuA4ajUINNLMd9DehthlPP_FkZI9V8-k=)**
Thank you,
Nan Whaley HQ

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: The fundraising trends we’re noticing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
We noticed a concerning trend in our online fundraising, Peter.
Pramila relies on small-dollar donations from our grassroots supporters. She doesn’t take a dime from the corporate PACs that have massive influence in Congress. So, it’s significant that we saw a **19% decrease in online fundraising last quarter.**
During a midterm election year when Pramila is running for re-election and we’re fighting to protect the Democratic majority in the House, we cannot see our fundraising numbers continue to drop. [**Can you donate $3 today to help us turn our fundraising around?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14523?refcode=em20220710-1414&t=1&akid=1414%2E420207%2EacZvVl)
Here’s what’s on the line:
Over the last few months, our campaign has provided field organizing, phone banking, and fundraising support for people-first progressives running in primaries and Democrats running in tough swing district races against Republicans. Pramila has traveled to be on the ground to knock doors and build support for Democrats in states across the country.
That all costs money. It’s work we can only sustain with your support.
Pramila is also facing her own re-election race, as Republicans challenge her in WA-7. We’re organizing across our district, formulating GOTV plans, and talking to voters about Pramila’s work. As we ramp up ahead of our primary, we’re going to need a wave of grassroots support.
[**Peter, can you help us reverse our fundraising downturn and chip in today? Pramila is relying on your support so she can win re-election and protect our majorities in Congress.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14523?refcode=em20220710-1414&t=2&akid=1414%2E420207%2EacZvVl)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14523?refcode=em20220710-1414&t=21&akid=1414%2E420207%2EacZvVl)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220710-1414-footer&t=22&refcode2=1414_420207_acZvVl&akid=1414%2E420207%2EacZvVl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1414%2E420207%2EacZvVl)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1414%2E420207%2EacZvVl)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: CAMPAIGN GOAL UPDATE: If state legislatures get the power to overturn the popular vote, don’t be left wishing you’d done more to elect good people to
body:
A small dollar donation that can make a big impact
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, thank you all so much! This weekend, 119 of you donated to support the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee’s efforts to get more good Democratic candidates in our vital state legislatures! Great work, everyone. [**Could 31 of you please join us tonight and bring it to 150 donations for the weekend? Your generous $2, $7, or $15 contribution would be so appreciated and useful as we pivot to the general election!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T758a0c5c-712a-4c8e-bb82-7a8ba4fed6d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Together for the marathon & not just the sprint, Cliff On Sat, Jul 9, 2022 at 10:08 PM Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action <info@blueampaction.com> wrote: Peter, this is really important to think about. Picture this: Democrats win the 2024 presidential election, but a Republican is inaugurated in 2025. What do I mean? Imagine it's 2024, we all turn out, vote Democratic and win a huge electoral majority. Then state legislatures around the country convene and decide they disagree, overrule the voters, and send their electoral slates for Donald Trump, Michael Flynn or Marjorie Taylor Greene to Washington. This is not just a fantasy. I wish it were. This could happen. The same Supreme Court that forced a 10-year old little girl to leave Ohio so she wouldn't have to carry a rapist's child has agreed to take a case, Moore v Harper, that could end with their declaring state legislative supremacy. A ridiculous and radical notion, authoritarian to its core, this would mean the will of gerrymandered Republican state legislatures can decide which electoral votes count, no matter for whom their constituents voted. It is pure insanity. And it absolutely could happen. [**Can you please join me, Stacey Abrams, Michelle Obama and other concerned Democrats in doing all we can to "keep it," by supporting the DLCC right now with a donation of $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14ea1039-1317-4a0f-a83d-d833cad5835a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is why even though it's not as sexy nor as covered on cable news, WE MUST win control of as many state legislatures as possible. It means supporting the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee (DLCC), tasked with helping win state legislative seats across the country. **Stacey Abrams and Michelle Obama just launched a huge campaign to raise funds for the DLCC, and we'd like to do our part to pitch in to winning these crucial races, which could determine if Republicans or Democrats control t****he state senate in Michigan, ****Minnesota, Colorado, Oregon and Nevada, ****the state house in Alaska and both the state house and state senate in Maine.**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DEMOCRATIC LEGISLATIVE CAMPAIGN COMMITTEE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73076b8e-e4f3-4a48-acc6-aba233c73b93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I can't stress how important it is that we take these chambers--all within a few seats of going either way. It not only builds a bench of talent (President Obama got his start as a state senator) and decides important policies in the states, **but can be a bulwark against Republican attempts to corrupt the 2024 election, declaring themselves victors when they lose the popular and electoral vote.** As Benjamin Franklin walked out of Philadelphia's Constitution Hall in 1787, an onlooker asked him whether we'd be "a republic or a monarchy." Franklin's rejoinder has echoed across time: "A republic. If you can keep it." [**Can you please join me, Stacey Abrams, Michelle Obama and other concerned Democrats in doing all we can to "keep it," by supporting the DLCC right now with a donation of $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d5642d2-5b0e-483f-8944-d8ce04f975f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your tireless devotion to democracy. Cliff
---
|
---

...so here are **3 numbers you MUST remember** whenever they try to pull the wool over your eyes between now and November:
**First Number is[ 66.](http://email.email.doug4gov.com/c/eJxdUU1PxCAU_DXsrQ3Qbts99KBu9uLBmGiiJ8LCa4vho6Gg7v56oVZNTAjkzcC8YZ7sO44PuNupnmJKcUswJVVL6nKoa9wJXJ1rQbAAjmoMhitdShfHenTvpXBmN_XnVnLSAa_OsMdQkcOAD9DsxSCapqm7eqf7KYR5QdUNoqe0FhDRQ_mhrAeZRRI2eAVWLoUbiixfGL4Er7h1iZOGSWeZM8xGwbQttCUMDPv2iwmqTj5LemVHVB2Dj4Bow42LNqS6aVIVg2EGpIomIes3NnBx0QtIoBWacTNrNVw2SqSSq9Emcm3U_bnKhnhQ2ZW-mFmJrM2zPw1xYZpHK6bt2LO1H_uJ90fd2QCrwdS5iOLz7XS19IUnmlmtZCL-gZOSKcQj5g9P2O98L-cPpbVamjaNZlxHkyeyfaJH7S2idH1E6Ro-fb23_HV6Hq-PxQNci5eRZIrepT1cZvi9t0mUW1AUtccviOq0vA)
**
* **66% of Americans say ECONOMIC ISSUES are the most important** in 2022. Things like **inflation, gas prices, and jobs.

**
* **Democrats won’t talk about economic issues** because they wrecked our economy... so they keep bringing up stuff _no one cares abou_ t, hoping something will stick.

**Second Number is[ 35.](http://email.email.doug4gov.com/c/eJxdUctuwyAQ_Bp8swXYjp2DD22jXHqIIjVV0wsigG0kHhaGRsnXF1ynlSoh0M4ss7O7vGsp3MI2kx2GGMMGQYzKBlVFX1WwZbC8VAxBJiiooNBUqoLbMFSD_SqY1dnY8ZjSIlE3TOAN3dC2besLgnzbII62lGeqG72fZlA-AbyPZxYsOFFcpXGCJ5GI9U4Kw-fc9nmSzzWdvZPU2MhxTbg1xGpiAiPK5MogIjT58QsRKPcuSTppBlDuvAsCRCfaBuNjXNYxCl4TLbgMOiJLGys42-CYiKBhilA9KdnfVorFkMrBRHIp1P65Soaol8mVuulJsqRNkz8lwkwUDYaN61OTpR55jPehbo0Xi8FYOQ-ffLq9H8-nZJYYJXkk_oGj5HGIO0gPb9BlruPTVSol500TVzMsq0kbWZvoQPMMMF4-YbwMH59fDT2Pp-F-zA_inn8MKFH4Jd7-NonfvFWiWAeFQbP7BuMFtCY)**
* Just **35% of Americans approve of Joe Biden** ... _rejecting_ the socialist agenda Democrat politicians like Josh Shapiro want to inflict on Pennsylvania.

* **Democrats won’t talk about Biden** because he’s the worst President in our lifetimes... so they want to make this election about President Trump, who left office 2 years ago.

**Third Number is[ 10.](http://email.email.doug4gov.com/c/eJxVUU1P7SAU_DXcXRs4rVIXXahXNy7UqMlzRSjQloSPhoI3118v1PqMCYGcGZgzzJF9x_EV7g66BwyAKcFAGkraemxb3AncDK0gWCiOWqws16aWPk3t5D9q4e1h7jMFV4QCHRrgYhilEFR1fLgAIpumEwfTzzEuK2quEdzntSqRgqpP2gUli0jGxqCVk2vlx6rIV5avMWjufOakZdI75i1zSTDjKuMIU5Z9-8UENfehSAbtJtQcY0gKwSW3PrmYa4JzlaJlVkmdbEa2b-zg6lMQKoNOGMbtYvR43imRS64nl8mtUffrqhjiURdX5mwXLYo2L_6MSiszPDkx78cF2_qxn3h_1L2LajOYO1fu7unmhaaTGDLNnNGyEH_BWcsc4hHzx1ccDqGXy0kbo9dLmkczbaMpE9k_0SN6gwC2RwBb-PD-4Pj7_DZ9PleP6rP6N5FCwW3e43lR_-_tEvUeFCB6_AL027SG)
**
* Just **10% of Americans think this nation is on the right track **under Biden’s Far-Left policies. That’s the _lowest ever recorded.

_
* **Democrats won’t talk about their agenda** because it’s already _failed_ ... so they’re trying to rewrite the truth with propaganda, censorship, and media gaslighting.

clean_body: Here’s what they mean and why they matter. | | Peter, Democrats like Josh Shapiro would rather talk about ANYTHING than their record of failure... ...so here are 3 numbers you MUST remember whenever they try to pull the wool over your eyes between now and November: First Number is 66% of Americans say ECONOMIC ISSUES are the most important in 2022. Things like inflation, gas prices, and jobs. Democrats won’t talk about economic issues because they wrecked our economy... so they keep bringing up stuff no one cares abou t, hoping something will stick. Second Number is Just 35% of Americans approve of Joe Biden ... rejecting the socialist agenda Democrat politicians like Josh Shapiro want to inflict on Pennsylvania. Democrats won’t talk about Biden because he’s the worst President in our lifetimes... so they want to make this election about President Trump, who left office 2 years ago. Third Number is Just 10% of Americans think this nation is on the right track under Biden’s Far-Left policies. That’s the lowest ever recorded. Democrats won’t talk about their agenda because it’s already failed ... so they’re trying to rewrite the truth with propaganda, censorship, and media gaslighting. As long as we continue to speak to the issues that matter to the American people, we can and will win this race. But I’ll be blunt: between now and November, Leftist politicians like Josh Shapiro and Joe Biden will try everything to make voters forget what really matters. They’re going to try to lie, cheat, and smear their way to victory just like they did in 2020. | | | | Thanks, Doug | | | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DOUG MASTRIANO

Hey Derek, it’s Team Fetterman! We want to take a moment to pull back the curtain and give you an inside look at our online email fundraising program.
**Email fundraising is a major source of the donations our campaign needs to function.** Nearly 40% of everything we raised last quarter came in through emails like this one.
As a people-powered campaign, we rely on supporters like you chipping in $5, $25, or even $50 at a time to do our work. Unlike Dr. Oz, we don’t have millions of dollars to self-fund.
Real people set our fundraising goals, write these emails (hi! 👋), and track our progress. And we know you are a real person, too. This is why we’ll never resort to sky-is-falling tactics to scare you into contributing.
Dr. Oz, unsurprisingly, can’t say the same. Just take a look at these tricksy tactics he includes in his online fundraising emails, Derek.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220710-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220710-6474&refcode2=6474_434096_9YXFNw&akid=6474%2E434096%2E9YXFNw)
_Blink and you’ll miss these pre-checked boxes that rope you into giving extra cash._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220710-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220710-6474&refcode2=6474_434096_9YXFNw&akid=6474%2E434096%2E9YXFNw)
_Oh no, the multi-millionaire is DESPERATE for your money!_
From lying about "8x matches" to putting a pre-checked box in the fine print (which can mislead people into giving an automatically recurring donation), Dr. Oz is raising money online 100% unethically. He’s a scam doctor using scam tactics to try and trick people into funding this Senate seat for him.
People deserve respect from the candidates running to serve them. That’s why from Day One, we’ve built our incredible people-powered movement by leveling with you about the stakes of this race.
No fear-mongering, no "gotcha" fine print, and absolutely no “8x matches." Just the truth about why John Fetterman is running for Senate, and why supporting our campaign is so damn important.
[**_Pennsylvanians deserve so much better than a scam artist like Dr. Oz. If you agree, will you chip in $5 or any amount you can today to help John Fetterman defeat him? We’re grateful for your support, and we’ll always put in the honest work to earn it._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220710-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220710-6474&refcode2=6474_434096_9YXFNw&akid=6474%2E434096%2E9YXFNw)
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220710-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220710-6474&refcode2=6474_434096_9YXFNw&akid=6474%2E434096%2E9YXFNw)**
Building real relationships with you and your fellow supporters is so important. Thank you for your support, Derek, it means the world.
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220710-6474-footer&t=1&refcode2=6474_434096_9YXFNw&akid=6474%2E434096%2E9YXFNw)**

clean_body: I need your help to take back Georgia’s Senate seat. Are you with me? | Peter, I've got a quick message for you. You may have heard that Democrat Raphael Warnock is outraising our campaign 2:1. Will you please: 1. Watch my video message 📱 >> 2. We don't need to outraise our opponent, but we've got to keep it close. Right now, our race is listed as a toss-up, but we need to move the needle because the Senate majority is on the line. Let's take back this Senate seat. BOOM! Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Beto for Texas
subject: No other option
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We must elect a pro-choice governor.
#
It’s simple: Greg Abbott is dragging Texas backwards — but we are going to move our state forward.
Now that the Supreme Court has said it’s up to the states to determine whether a person has the freedom to control their own body, we must elect a Governor who believes in the right to choose. _There’s no other option._
**[We’re going to need everyone to pitch in, including you. Please contribute $3 or any amount you can spare right now to help defeat anti-choice Greg Abbott in November. name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawnna=20Bolick?=
subject: Election Integrity Victories from This Past Legislative Session
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
Securing Our Election Remains My Top Priority | | |
---
| | Good afternoon Freedom Fighters,

Earlier this month, we closed out another lengthy legislative session in Arizona history. There were a few key election integrity victories. First, Governor Ducey signed [HB 2492](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8dd3ba3763&e=a7ab36849c) into law. This commonsense statute requires a citizenship status question on every voter registration application, requiring citizenship and residency verification, and outlines eligibility requirements for federal-only voters. It was so popular with the Left that the [Department of Justice](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=be290cbf95&e=a7ab36849c) filed a lawsuit against it earlier in the week.

Second, the legislature referred [SCR 1012](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=21d68d9a17&e=a7ab36849c) to the November ballot. [YES on 309](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=acdb1151a0&e=a7ab36849c) is one of the most important ballot initiatives eliciting an emphatic YES vote. It will strengthen early voting security by requiring registered voters provide their date of birth and either the last four digits of their Social Security Number, Arizona Driver’s License number, or an Arizona non-operating identification number in addition to their signature on their mail-in ballot affidavit to return a ballot. I proudly supported both measures and I look forward to seeing 309 become the law of the land.

I recently wrote an article for the Rayne Report where I broke down many of our legislative victories passed this session. You can read it [here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=99d34ca9bd&e=a7ab36849c).
---
| [Keep Our State Leadership Conservative](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9245abe15f&e=a7ab36849c "Keep Our State Leadership Conservative")
---
| While these important legislative victories help secure our elections, we have a long way to go when it comes to restoring election integrity. I vow to make this one of my top priorities as your Secretary of State—your chief election officer.

That’s why I invited True the Vote to the Capitol (to help my colleagues understand the severity of the situation and to _act)_.

That’s why I’m supporting Arizonans for Voter ID this November (to make sure that voters must show an ID to cast a ballot).
---
| [Help Build the #RedWave in 2022!](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ff07a269c7&e=a7ab36849c "Help Build the #RedWave in 2022!")
---
| I’m the only candidate serious about election integrity because I’m the only one with a clear [Roadmap to Restore Election Integrity](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1eba948610&e=a7ab36849c). This thorough, multi-level plan will hold our elected officials accountable. I understand the duty and responsibility that rests in the Secretary of State’s office to secure our elections and make sure that every legal vote counts. I’m committed to ensuring that every Arizonan can trust election outcomes once again.
---
| [Support a Conservative Candidate that Puts Parents First](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=59603da49c&e=a7ab36849c "Support a Conservative Candidate that Puts Parents First")
---
| Speaking of elections, in case you haven’t heard, early voting has started for the primary! It would be a privilege to have your support and earn your vote when you cast your ballot. I would be grateful if you could tell your friends and family to vote Bolick for Secretary of State too.
---
| [Send a True Conservative Leader to the Office of Secretary of State](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=95b4418ffa&e=a7ab36849c "Send a True Conservative Leader to the Office of Secretary of State")
---
| Thank you for your continued support,
---
|
---
| Shawnna Bolick
---
| **Key dates and info for the primary election:**

Early voting: July 6 to July 29
Absentee/mail-in deadline: July 26
Election day: August 2
In-person polling locations are open from 6 a.m. to 7 p.m.

_For more information about registration, how to vote, or where to vote, visit_[ _Arizona.Vote_](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9464a6decb&e=a7ab36849c) _._

Please join us at one of our upcoming events:

**Friday, July 15 th**
Please join me and other statewide candidates for a Candidate Meet and Greet in Cave Creek. For address please RSVP to Ben at [info@bolickforarizona.com](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com).

**Friday, July 19 th**
Please join me and other statewide candidates for a Candidate Meet and Greet in Phoenix. For address please RSVP to Ben at [info@bolickforarizona.com](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com).

---

---
| | [](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=42c810f859&e=a7ab36849c)

| | Friend, The past few weeks have been HUGE in terms of endorsements for the Schmidt-Sawyer Team.
Derek and Katie won some key endorsements from organizations that either backed Laura Kelly or stayed neutral in 2018. The fact these groups of Kansans are now supporting our campaign shows how much momentum we have, the groundswell of support for this movement, and that Kansans are ready for a change in the governor’s office. **If you’re ready for a change, friend, Team Schmidt-Sawyer needs your support!**

_“I’ve known Derek Schmidt for 20 years and every step of the way he’s earned the trust_ _of_ _Kansas farm_ _e_ _rs and ranchers. He knows our issues as a former Senate Agriculture Committee Chairman and he knows our people as someone who’s traveled the state and its 105 counties many times. He listens to Kansans and has the right values to lead our state, and we’re excited to endorse him today.”_ _
_**Rich Felts, President of Kansas Farm Bureau

** _“Derek Schmidt has long been a strong supporter of law enforcement and he has advocated to make Kansas_ _a safer place to live, work, and raise a family. He has always been supportive of the __Kansas State_ ___Trooper_ _s, and we are proud to support him.... We need new leadership to partner with us to protect Kansans and we know Derek Schmidt is that leader.”_**Kansas State Troopers’ Association

** _"Derek Schmidt is a staunch supporter of our Second Amendment freedoms and he will continue to fight to protect our fundamental right to self-defense. Kansans can trust Derek Schmidt to protect their constitutional right to keep and bear arms.”_
**National Rifle Association Political Victory Fund

** Derek also received the endorsement of the NRA’s state affiliate, the Kansas State Rifle Association. _“Derek Schmidt is an incredible friend to law enforcement who has always had our backs as attorney general. We at the_ _Fraternal_ ___Order_ ___of_ ___Police_ _are thrilled he has made the choice to continue his public service and entered the race for governor. Today we are proud to announce our endorsement_ _of_ _AG Schmidt for governor_ _of_ _Kansas. Derek will be a law-and-__order_ _governor who always has the safety and security_ _of_ _our Kansas communities top_ _of_ _mind, and has already announced a solid public safety plan to reduce violent crime and protect our students in schools. We look forward to continuing our partnership with him in his new role as governor and we encourage all Kansans to vote for him in November.”_ **Kansas Fraternal Order of Police** _“I have had the opportunity to meet with Derek on a number of occasions. He has always taken the time to listen to my concerns and has always been a strong defender of law enforcement. As Kansas Attorney General, Derek has proven his knowledge and abilities to better the lives of Kansans. I am very proud to support Derek in his bid for governor and ask the voters to put their faith and confidence in him that I have. He will not disappoint us._**Brown County Sheriff John Merchant**

Derek and Katie won some key endorsements from organizations| | | | | Friend, The past few weeks have been HUGE in terms of endorsements for the Schmidt-Sawyer Team. Derek and Katie won some key endorsements from organizations that either backed Laura Kelly or stayed neutral in 2018. The fact these groups of Kansans are now supporting our campaign shows how much momentum we have, the groundswell of support for this movement, and that Kansans are ready for a change in the governor’s office. If you’re ready for a change, friend, Team Schmidt-Sawyer needs your support! Friend, don’t delay - Laura Kelly’s soliciting more and more support - from outside of Kansas - every day to cling to the Governor’s seat. Please see more information below on support for Derek’s plans from new endorsements. “I’ve known Derek Schmidt for 20 years and every step of the way he’s earned the trust of Kansas farm e rs and ranchers. He listens to Kansans and has the right values to lead our state, and we’re excited to endorse him today.” Rich Felts, President of Kansas Farm Bureau “Derek Schmidt has long been a strong supporter of law enforcement and he has advocated to make Kansas a safer place to live, work, and raise a family. He has always been supportive of the Kansas State Trooper s, and we are proud to support him.... We need new leadership to partner with us to protect Kansans and we know Derek Schmidt is that leader.”Kansas State Troopers’ Association "Derek Schmidt is a staunch supporter of our Second Amendment freedoms and he will continue to fight to protect our fundamental right to self-defense. clean_body: I need your help to take back Georgia’s Senate seat. Are you with me? | Peter, I've got a quick message for you. You may have heard that Democrat Raphael Warnock is outraising our campaign 2:1. Will you please: 1. Watch my video message 📱 >> 2. We don't need to outraise our opponent, but we've got to keep it close. Right now, our race is listed as a toss-up, but we need to move the needle because the Senate majority is on the line. Let's take back this Senate seat. BOOM! Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

So this is a slightly different type of scary. _**[But we’re short of reaching our goal. And we have never failed to meet a goal like this...](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=308354e79cfe41b5b0330663c7f92258&_e=SNlT16mRnuVNPHokxmW7enHR9eMgH2o8qYd8GwIE89XqYQX-dBpHYy00ZBupM49KD16vNPIQieMCP1XvCM13hFP9UHnpmr96n6qIhRhyhiAX3Jtn50zCp5NXkxc-qW_vnlZ4sBgsbAaJQ8IKygqaB5qgoHaTDzgn1RS03BUYltHlh6OJqZbRVXhkVHitTFnGervdVJQ99I5vsqlLHJxOodUaW_i5W0Kgwx8Z7i2vqjAkyw0AaQvLju_CDVfokAp62JSmO6R8HVCrFBYDJu5OoD4-7onoFUub1tJRwxnVBXKmajxPEzj1KJg9eFDfevVfLSlJZZQipAf7u1R3f3r59BjOrwbAE9SQ-VuqWVqA7QuxNS9gehcuJtVzwUp0eptBn6FXt5WU0xl_oTnSYx53760cxrZFR0OoKZ9YQgNprDuCNXXOx0Jv0ypQfTZYnatZKEJxRIHHokW5BC10HRWbl-iQkOHoVL_Or1fmRwAvt32gp8xjCkU75GfzZeF1Cw7nhl4Lndo70Uq65KWXvaJhjw%3D%3D)**_

Sunday scaries are going to be a bit scarier tonight. We set an internal goal of getting 4,000 people to donate by midnight to Take Back the Majority, but we’re still **[1,000 donors short.
